news.summary: The innovative system effectively stops heat transfer to neighboring cells, rapidly putting out fires by deploying an agent within just 5 minutes of ignition. With leading nations advocating for compulsory steps to avert thermal runaway incidents, this solution is anticipated to garner significant attention in the push for increased fire safety measures.
news.headline: Hyundai Mobis unveils battery system with fire extinguishing feature, extinguishing fires within 5 mins to prevent thermal runaway.

news.summary: In Hong Kong on April 14, 2025, OneOdio, a renowned DJ headphone brand with ten years of experience, unveiled its latest innovation - the Studio Max 1 Wireless DJ Headphones. This cutting-edge product, created in partnership with a globally recognized DJ, marks a significant milestone for the brand.
news.headline: OneOdio launches Studio Max 1 Wireless DJ Headphones, set to redefine DJ experiences. Collaboration with acclaimed DJ.

news.summary: In Chicago, Hormbles Chormbles has unveiled its innovative debut product line of chocolate-flavored candy bars aimed at revolutionizing the candy market. These bars are high in protein with 10g, contain zero sugar, and amount to only 100 calories. The brand's mission is to provide a guilt-free treat for health-conscious individuals seeking a tasty indulgence. Founded by Jared Smith, Co-Founder of RXBAR, Hormbles Chormbles aims to fill a gap in the market for a healthier alternative.
news.headline: Hormbles Chormbles launches high-protein, zero-sugar candy bars with 10g protein, 0g sugar, and 100 calories each, founded by Jared Smith of RXBAR.

news.summary: Boston-based restaurant chain Applebee's has chosen Pasadena-headquartered Toast Technology as its new partner for point of sale and kitchen display systems. This collaboration aims to enhance efficiency and streamline operations across Applebee's locations. The deal signifies a promising new chapter for the chain, as it looks to integrate advanced technology solutions into its workflow.
news.headline: Applebee's chooses Toast Technology for new POS and Kitchen Display Systems partnership.

news.summary: Trove, a prominent company specializing in branded resale and customer trade-in, is making significant progress in its expansion efforts in Europe and globally with the acquisition of reverse.supply, a prominent player in the European branded resale sector based in Germany. Through this strategic move, Trove is reaching a key milestone in its international platform expansion, enhancing the accessibility, scalability, and operational efficiency of branded resale for brands in over 30 countries. This acquisition leverages Trove's advanced technology platform alongside the expertise of reverse.supply, solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Trove expands in Europe by acquiring reverse.supply, enhancing resale services across 30 countries.

news.summary: Houston-based company NextDecade Corporation (NASDAQ: NEXT) recently revealed that TotalEnergies (NYSE: TTE) has opted to purchase LNG from Train 4 at the Rio Grande LNG Facility. As part of this agreement, both companies' subsidiaries have entered into a long-term LNG sale and purchase agreement. TotalEnergies Gas & Power North America, Inc. will be acquiring 1.5 million tonnes of LNG under this SPA.
news.headline: NextDecade and TotalEnergies sign LNG agreement for Train 4 at Rio Grande LNG, 1.5 MTPA to be purchased.

news.summary: A report titled "Germany Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The gift card market in Germany is projected to see a yearly growth rate of 11%, reaching a value of US$18.06 billion in 2025. Between 2020 and 2024, Germany's gift card market demonstrated strong expansion, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.7%. This trend is anticipated to persist, with the market expected to further grow at a CAGR of 9%.
news.headline: Germany's gift card market projected to reach $25.87 billion in 2029, growing by 11% annually to $18.06 billion in 2025.

news.summary: Clean Energy Fuels Corp. revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for Q1 2025 on May 8, 2025, post-market closing on the Nasdaq under ticker symbol CLNE. The report will be followed by an investor conference call scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) on the same day. Leading the call will be Clean Energy's President and CEO Andrew J. Littlefair alongside CFO Robert M. Vreeland. Those wishing to join the live call can dial 1.800. This announcement serves as a precursor to the anticipated insights to be shared during the upcoming investor conference call.
news.headline: Clean Energy Fuels to disclose Q1 2025 earnings on May 8 followed by a conference call at 1:30 p.m. PT with top executives.
Current tariffs feel personal due to rising tensions; US imposed $250 billion tariffs, China $110 billion retaliation.

news.summary: Crypto asset manager CoinShares reported that digital asset exchange-traded products (ETPs) witnessed $795 million outflows last week, marking the third consecutive week of outflows. Bitcoin-based products accounted for $751 million of the outflows, while Ether products saw $37.6 million leave. Altcoins like XRP, Ondo Finance, Algorand, and Avalanche saw small gains amidst the overall outflows trend. Since February, total outflows from crypto ETPs have reached $7.2 billion, cancelling out year-to-date inflows. Market uncertainty related to tariff activities, initiated by President Donald Trump, significantly impacted the outflows. The negative sentiment since February led to record outflows, primarily affecting Bitcoin and Ether-based products. Altcoins Solana, Aave, and Sui collectively suffered over $6 million outflows last week. Despite the outflows, Bitcoin-related products managed YTD gains of $545 million. BlackRock's iShares ETFs experienced the most outflows among ETP providers, with $342 million outflows last week and $412 million month-to-date. BlackRock still had $2.8 billion YTD inflows, with over $49.6 billion in assets under management.
news.headline: Crypto ETPs lose $7.2B as outflows reach $800M last week. Altcoins like XRP, Ondo Finance see gains amid record outflows.

news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, Digimarc Corporation (NASDAQ: DMRC), a leading digital watermarking company, has been acknowledged for its significant contribution to the first commercial-scale validation of digital watermarks' potential to transform plastic recycling. The trials took place at the Hündgen Entsorgung material recovery facility in Swisttal, Germany, as part of the HolyGrail 2.0 Digital Watermarks Initiative. Results showcased that Digimarc's technology facilitates precise and automated processes, marking a milestone in the recycling sector.
news.headline: Digimarc's technology validated at HolyGrail 2.0 trials for plastic recycling in Germany by Hündgen Entsorgung with industrial scale.

news.summary: The 2025 EMEA recipient of the WRDS Innovation Award has been announced by Wharton Research Data Services. The award has been granted to the Alliance Manchester Business School located in Philadelphia. This prestigious recognition acknowledges the school's outstanding contributions to academic research and innovation.
news.headline: University of Manchester wins 2025 WRDS Innovation Award from Wharton Research Data Services. Alliance Manchester Business School honored as EMEA recipient.

news.summary: Assisting Hands Home Care of Frederick, situated in Frederick, Md., has recently announced the expansion of its in-home care services to cover Frederick, Carroll, and Washington Counties. The company now offers compassionate and top-notch care to seniors in these areas to ensure comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. This expansion aims to provide more individuals with the opportunity to access their high-quality services.
news.headline: Assisting Hands Home Care expands services to Frederick, Carroll, and Washington counties, offering in-home care for seniors.

news.summary: A cybersecurity company based in Palo Alto, California revealed a significant product release on April 14, 2025. Seemplicity introduced the latest version of their vulnerability and exposure management platform aimed at revolutionizing risk reduction for security teams. This platform is known for being the market leader in this space, and the company is eager to showcase the advancements to their clients and the industry. The release emphasizes the company's dedication to enhancing security measures and keeping up with technological advancements.
news.headline: Seemplicity releases new AI-powered exposure management capabilities to enhance security, reduce risk.

news.summary: NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW) is anticipating sustained growth in its connectivity services revenue until 2025. The company, based in Coconut Grove, Florida, is banking on contract renewals for hardware along with lucrative recurring airtime services to drive this growth. These aspects are critical for boosting the revenue numbers in the connectivity services sector for the company.
news.headline: NextPlat Corp's Global Telesat gets contract extension from military customer, renewing hardware and airtime services to drive revenue growth through 2025.

news.summary: Although global markets are showing signs of recovery, a recent survey conducted among company executives reveals a sense of apprehension among them. The survey indicates that many business leaders are considering reducing their investment expenditure in response to uncertain economic conditions. This cautious sentiment is reflected in a growing number of executives expressing concerns and hesitance towards expanding their operations. The survey's findings highlight a shift in the business community towards more conservative financial strategies amid volatile market trends.
news.headline: Survey of company leaders shows growing concern over Trump’s tariffs: Global markets rebound, but CEOs plan to reduce investments.

news.summary: Full House Resorts (NASDAQ: FLL) disclosed plans to reveal its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on May 8, 2025. An ensuing conference call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) on the same day. Interested investors can listen to the live audio webcast on the company’s website at www.fullhouseresorts.com in the investor relations segment. Alternatively, the conference call can be joined by dialing (646) 307-1865.
news.headline: Full House Resorts (NASDAQ: FLL) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: Today, Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SGBX) disclosed the pricing details of a Private Placement, estimating the gross proceeds at around $8.0 million. The company, known for its expertise in creating modular structures, revealed this information, indicating a significant financial boost through this investment.
news.headline: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SGBX) announces $8.0 million Private Placement.

news.summary: An individual diagnosed with liver cancer achieved a remarkable cancer-free survival period of 8 years following treatment with Namodenoson in a previous Phase II study. This promising outcome signifies a significant advancement in the field of cancer treatment, indicating the potential efficacy of Namodenoson in enhancing survival rates. Such results highlight the critical role that innovative therapies like Namodenoson can play in combating challenging diseases such as liver cancer, offering hope to patients and healthcare professionals alike.
news.headline: Can-Fite reported 8-year cancer-free survival in liver cancer patient treated with Namodenoson in prior Phase II study.

news.summary: Singapore, April 14, 2025 - Fintech company CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR) revealed plans to disclose its full year 2024 financial outcomes on Wednesday, April 16, 2025. The company utilizes artificial intelligence (AI) to provide financial institutions globally with innovative solutions. The report is set to be released prior to the market opening.
news.headline: CURRENC Group (Nasdaq: CURR) will report full year 2024 financial results on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: A new channel sales partner has been appointed in the Brazilian market to promote and sell HEXWAVE's technology in various critical security sectors. The partner will focus on marketing and selling HEXWAVE's products in different key security verticals within the Brazilian market.
news.headline: Liberty Defense sells HEXWAVE unit, gains new partner in Brazil, expands sales into security verticals. Launches investor campaign.

news.summary: Tel Aviv, Israel - HUB Cyber Security Ltd. disclosed today, April 14, 2025, the appointment of John Rogers as President of the Americas Region. HUB, a prominent player in confidential computing and advanced data fabric technology, is traded on NASDAQ under ticker symbol HUBC. This strategic decision aligns with the Company's mission to set up its U.S. headquarters in the upcoming summer, marking a noteworthy progression in their expansion strategy throughout North America and the broader Americas region.
news.headline: Hub Cyber Security appoints John Rogers as President of Americas to lead U.S. market expansion. Establishing U.S. headquarters this summer.

news.summary: Many tech companies, including Apple, have been granted relief from a significant number of Trump's tariffs. However, President Trump has emphasized that this reprieve is only temporary. This development has caused a notable jump in Dow Jones Futures. Palantir, specifically, has made a bullish move in response to this news.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures rise on news of Trump tariff exemption for Apple, tech companies; Palantir also sees bullish move.

news.summary: A new partnership is setting up two production facilities in the United States in stages to cater to the increasing demand for off-road vehicles. This move is also in line with clean energy incentives provided under the U.S. Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act.
news.headline: Kandi and CBAK form partnership to launch 2 lithium battery facilities in U.S., aiming to meet off-road vehicle demand.

news.summary: A conference call to review the first quarter 2025 outcomes of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) will take place on April 23, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific Time. The event will be followed by the release of a press statement containing the quarterly financial results just before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on the same day. Visit www.teledyne.com/investors/events-and-presentations about ten minutes before the call starts to participate.
news.headline: Teledyne Technologies (NYSE: TDY) to discuss Q1 2025 earnings on April 23, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Pacific time. Visit www.teledyne.com for call access.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in Fort Mill, South Carolina, Catheter Precision, Inc. (VTAK - NYSE/American), a US medical device firm concentrating on innovative products for the cardiac electrophysiology sector, revealed the receipt of a notice of allowance from the US Patent Office. This patent, filed in December 2022, marks their inaugural patent in the US for the LockeT product, which is a surgical closure device crafted for orthoscopic entry wounds. This development underscores the company's commitment to pioneering advancements in the field, showcasing their dedication to cutting-edge technology.
news.headline: Catheter Precision, Inc. is granted its first US patent for the LockeT product - surgical closure device for entry wounds.

news.summary: A software company based in Exton, Pennsylvania, Bentley Systems, recently revealed that its geotechnical information management and reporting software known as OpenGround has attained FedRAMP® In Process status. FedRAMP®, which stands for Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program, is a government-wide program that provides a standardized approach to security assessment, authorization, and continuous monitoring for cloud products and services. This achievement signifies that OpenGround is currently undergoing the stringent security review process required for federal agencies. FedRAMP® compliance is essential for software used by federal government agencies as it ensures the product meets the necessary security standards. Bentley Systems' OpenGround software is now moving closer to meeting all the regulatory requirements to be used in federal projects.
news.headline: Bentley's OpenGround software listed on FedRAMP Marketplace, achieving In Process status for geotechnical management.

news.summary: 180 Degree Capital Corp (NASDAQ: TURN) based in Montclair, New Jersey, released an update on its portfolio company holdings for the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: 180 Degree Capital Corp. announces $4.42 per share as of March 31, 2025, along with Q1 2025 portfolio updates.

news.summary: Foremost Clean Energy Ltd., a North American uranium and lithium exploration company trading on NASDAQ under the symbol FMST and CSE under FAT, has announced the hiring of Expert Geophysics Surveys Inc. to conduct a 771 line-kilometer MobileMT™ airborne geophysical survey over its CLK Uranium Property in Athabasca Basin, Saskatchewan. This survey aims to improve the understanding of conductive trends for uranium mineralization, following a 1997 drilling campaign that found uranium at 862 meters depth. Previous targeting relied on outdated geophysical methods, lacking the modern resolution provided by current systems.
news.headline: Foremost Clean Energy to conduct 771 km airborne geophysics survey over CLK Uranium Property for enhanced uranium exploration.

news.summary: In CAMAS, Washington, nLIGHT, Inc., a top supplier of high-power lasers for critical directed energy, optical sensing, and advanced manufacturing fields, revealed that it will unveil its financial outcomes for Q1 2025 post the financial markets' closure on Thursday, May 8, 2025. A conference call and webcast to deliberate the Q1 results are scheduled for Thursday, May 8, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time). nLIGHT, Inc. trades on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol LASR.
news.headline: nLIGHT (Nasdaq: LASR) to report Q1 2025 financial results on May 8 at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow at a rate of 4.6% in the upcoming year, with a projected GDP of $70 trillion. The report also highlights a potential increase in global trade, estimated to reach $20 trillion. Additionally, it predicts a rise in foreign direct investment by 10%, totaling around $3 trillion. These positive economic indicators suggest a promising outlook for the worldwide economy in the near future.
news.headline: Certara reveals Q1 2025 financials; plans $100M share buyback.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Cobalt, a leading provider of offensive security services, released its 7th annual State of Pentesting Report for 2025. The report highlights that organizations are addressing less than 50% of exploitable vulnerabilities, specifically only resolving 21% of genAI app flaws. The objective of the report is to analyze the current vulnerability landscape that organizations are facing in terms of cybersecurity.
news.headline: Organizations only fix <50% of vulnerabilities, with 21% of genAI app flaws resolved - Cobalt State of Pentesting Report 2025.

news.summary: With a post-close cash balance of $250 million, the company's financial runway is extended to over two years, allowing funding for pipeline development and key data catalysts until 2027.
news.headline: Coherus sells off UDENYCA® for success, ending with $250M cash balance, funding pipeline dev through 2027.

news.summary: Today, CBAK Energy disclosed a new collaboration to set up two lithium battery manufacturing plants in the United States. This move signifies a significant investment in the region's energy sector and is poised to create numerous job opportunities. The partnership aims to boost local production capacity and meet the increasing demand for lithium batteries in the country. This venture underscores a shared commitment to technological advancement and sustainability.
news.headline: CBAK Energy partners with Kandi to set up two lithium battery plants in the U.S., aiming for localization.

news.summary: In Celebration, FL, on April 14, 2025, La Rosa Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: LRHC) announced that they have been granted a 180-day extension by the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC to regain compliance with the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement. This extension, under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2), allows the company until October 6, 2025, to meet the stipulated requirement. The notification does not currently impact the trading status of the Company's common stock, which will still be available on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the symbol "LRHC."
news.headline: La Rosa Holdings Corp. receives 180-day extension from Nasdaq to meet $1.00 minimum bid price rule, deadline extended to October 6, 2025.

news.summary: Today, Cardiovascular Logistics (CVL) revealed a new agreement that will integrate over 90 cardiologists, along with 50 advanced practice providers, across 30 different locations into its national platform. As a physician-owned and physician-led cardiovascular network, this move signifies a significant expansion for CVL. The cooperation marks a notable increased presence for CVL in the healthcare sector, indicating a strategic growth plan to provide enhanced services and expertise in cardiovascular care.
news.headline: Partnership formed between Cardiovascular Logistics and Cardiology Consultants of Philadelphia, expanding care with 90 cardiologists, 50 advanced practice providers at 30 locations.

news.summary: Acknowledging the potential of off-the-shelf CAR T-cell therapy to meet a crucial demand, the company has initiated more frequent communication with the FDA to facilitate the development process. This move comes in response to the pressing need for effective treatments.
news.headline: FDA grants RMAT designation to Fate Therapeutics for FT819 to treat SLE, recognizing potential of off-the-shelf CAR T-cell therapy for unmet need.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, in San Jose, California, Anixa Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANIX), a biotech firm specializing in cancer treatment and prevention, revealed it obtained a Notice of Allowance from the U.S. Patent Office.
news.headline: Anixa Biosciences gets U.S. Patent Office notice for CAR-T technology, boosting IP portfolio. (numbers not provided)

news.summary: Lunchbox, a prominent player in enterprise restaurant catering and off-premise technology, made a significant announcement on April 14, 2025, declaring that Order Aggregation, commonly known as middleware, will be integrated into every new Lunchbox product without any additional charge. This strategic decision aims to enhance the services offered by Lunchbox and is in line with their goal of improving customer experience.
news.headline: Lunchbox offers free Order Aggregation with any product purchase, boosting support for restaurant growth.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Inveniam Capital Partners, a prominent data management platform for private market assets, revealed the purchase of Hedgehog Invest Limited, an all-encompassing digital platform specializing in real-world asset investment. This acquisition marks a significant step forward for Inveniam Capital Partners in expanding their services and offerings within the market.
news.headline: Inveniam buys Hedgehog to boost data infrastructure for private markets & AI. Acquisition of Hedgehog Invest Limited enhances digital asset investment.

news.summary: The primary MLS organization in Hawaii has partnered with FOREWARN to offer their 6,000+ real estate agents access to proactive safety services. This collaboration aims to enhance agent safety measures within the state and provide valuable resources to the real estate professionals.
news.headline: HiCentral MLS has partnered with FOREWARN to offer identity verification services to its 6,000+ real estate members for promoting agent safety.

news.summary: Southborough, Massachusetts - On April 14, 2025, Virtusa Corporation, a worldwide company offering digital strategy, digital engineering, and IT services, revealed its recognition as a Leader in the latest Everest Group Banking and Financial Services (BFS) IT report. This achievement highlights Virtusa's leadership in the industry and underscores its commitment to delivering top-notch solutions.
news.headline: Virtusa is a leader in Everest Group BFS IT Services Specialists in 2025. Global provider of digital services.

news.summary: In Naples, Florida on April 14, 2025, HealthLynked Corp. (OTCQB: HLYK), a healthcare technology innovator, has appointed Anthony "Tony" Scuilla as a strategic sales consultant. Scuilla's main objective will be to establish partnerships with major insurance companies to further develop HealthLynked's expanding healthcare network.
news.headline: HealthLynked appoints Anthony Scuilla as sales consultant to boost partnerships with insurance providers. #Healthcare #Innovation #Partnerships.

news.summary: Stoic Equity Partners, a commercial real estate investment manager and sponsor based in Mobile, Alabama, revealed the introduction of SEP Industrial Holdings II, LLC on April 14, 2025. The company is aiming to secure $15 million in equity from accredited investors through a 506(c) private placement offering.
news.headline: Stoic Equity Partners launches $15M investment fund for industrial flex properties in Southeast.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, NKGen Biotech, Inc. (OTC: NKGN) disclosed that their Chairman and CEO, Paul Y. Song, M.D., is set to speak at the 7 th China International Biotechnology Conference & Exhibition (BIOTEC-CHINA 2025) in Beijing from April 16-18, 2025. NKGen is a clinical-stage biotechnology company concentrating on autologous and allogeneic natural killer (NK) cell therapeutics. This event marks an important milestone for the company in showcasing their advancements in the field.
news.headline: NKGen Biotech will present on Troculeucel for Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s Disease at BIOTEC-CHINA 2025. CEO will speak at the event.

news.summary: Atrium, a prominent consulting firm specializing in artificial intelligence, caused a stir in the industry with the launch of their innovative AI agent on April 14, 2025. This cutting-edge technology is poised to shake up traditional Salesforce consulting methodologies by being quick, independent, and not charging hourly fees. Atrium's AI agent offers a disruptive alternative to conventional consulting services, challenging the status quo. This move promises to transform the consulting landscape significantly.
news.headline: Atrium introduces first AI consultant Andi, disrupting traditional Salesforce consulting with fast, autonomous services.

news.summary: Dublin and Chicago, 14th April 2025 - Iterum Therapeutics plc (Nasdaq: ITRM) shared news about their involvement in the 35th Annual European Congress of Clinical Microbiology and Infectious Disease (ECCMID) in Vienna, Austria, from April 11-15, 2025. The company, known for its focus on developing advanced oral and IV antibiotics for combating infections from multi-drug resistant pathogens, presented a poster during the event. The research and findings highlighted by the company are crucial for addressing antibiotic-resistant infections in community and hospital settings.
news.headline: Iterum Therapeutics presented one scientific poster at ECCMID 2025 in Vienna, highlighting age's impact on antibiotic resistance.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Solution Tree, a leading provider of professional development materials for educators, has acknowledged Windsor Central School District for being the first in the nation to achieve the Ambassador Model Professional Learning Community at Work® status.
news.headline: Windsor Central School District named first Ambassador Model PLC at Work® district by Solution Tree on April 14, 2025.

news.summary: A prestigious award has been clinched by the ultra-luxury, adults-only resort in Quintana Roo, Mexico. Impression Isla Mujeres by Secrets, part of the Hyatt Inclusive Collection, has earned the title of The Most Instagrammable Hotel in the World for 2025 for the second year running. This recognition highlights the resort's appeal and popularity, cementing its status as a top destination.
news.headline: Impression Isla Mujeres by Secrets wins Most Instagrammable Hotel award for 2025, second year in a row. Luxurious adults-only resort in Mexico.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) disclosed its plan to release the earnings report for the first quarter of 2025 on May 1, 2025, before the NYSE market opens. The company is scheduled to conduct its quarterly conference call and webcast on the same day, starting at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time.
news.headline: Enviri Corp (NYSE: NVRI) to release Q1 2025 results on May 1st, 2025, with conference call at 9:00 am ET.
